description: Overall, quire has been a great tool for managing our complex student engineering project. It's way better than notion to capture the dependencies and manage the tasks
author: Niel M.
pros: It's very easy to add tasks, setup dependencies and view the tasks in different formats. The Gantt chart works well, and the keyboard shortcuts are sensible!
cons: There are sometimes visual bugs and rendering issues. Some of the keyboard workflows are awkward/don't do what you initially expect but you get used to them
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Quire: Still My Favorite Project Planner After 10 Years
description: Overall, after nearly a decade of using it, I can say that Quire is a powerful, well‑designed, and highly practical project management tool, with a gentle learning curve and a feature set that genuinely adds value.
author: David G C.
pros: Quire is a very useful tool for planning projects, organising tasks, and sharing responsibilities within a team. One of its biggest strengths is how complete the free version already is, allowing you to manage most workflows without needing to upgrade. The paid plans then add a wide range of extra features which, while not strictly essential, make everything smoother and more efficient—especially for complex or collaborative projects. One of the features I appreciate the most is the integrated chat. Being able to communicate directly within the platform, attach files, links, and images, and keep all conversations tied to the relevant tasks makes coordination much easier and reduces the need for external tools.
cons: On the downside, the price can feel a bit high if you want full access for individual use. It’s not unreasonable, but it may make some users hesitate before committing to the complete version.

review_title: Great tool for organizing study tasks and academic projects
description: My overall experience with Quire has been very positive. As a student, I use it to organize assignments, track deadlines, and plan my study schedule. The task structure allows me to break large projects into smaller steps, which helps me stay organized and manage my time more effectively during the semester. The interface is simple and easy to use, making it a practical productivity tool for students who want to keep their academic work well organized.
author: Yimmy S.
pros: As a student, I really like how Quire helps me organize my assignments, study schedules, and academic projects in a clear way. The nested task structure makes it easy to break large assignments into smaller steps, which helps me stay focused and manage deadlines better. The interface is simple and intuitive, so I can quickly plan my study tasks without spending time learning complicated features. It’s a very practical tool for staying organized during the semester.
cons: So far my experience has been very positive. The platform works well for organizing tasks and study projects. One possible improvement could be adding more built-in templates for academic planning or study schedules, which could make it even easier for students to get started.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: it is easy to use and handle, which helps to safe time
author: agboola E.
pros: it has a minimalist interface which makes it easy to use
cons: mobile app limitations which makes quite stressful

review_title: Perfect Project Management Tool for Student Teams
description: Quire has significantly improved how we manage and execute our academic projects. As a doctoral student working with various student groups, it's important to have a tool that helps everyone stay aligned and productive. Quire provides exactly that. We use it weekly to assign tasks, track progress, and ensure deadlines are met. It’s become our go-to project management tool.
author: Serdar S.
pros: Quire’s clean and intuitive interface makes it extremely easy to manage complex projects with multiple team members. I love the nested task structure and how simple it is to assign, track, and comment on tasks. The real-time collaboration tools are also a huge plus for us as student groups.
cons: While the platform is excellent, it would be even more powerful if it had more timeline visualization tools available in the free plan. Also, more integrations with third-party apps would be helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall it is an efficient and visually clean task management solution. It have some useful collaboration feature.
author: Josh A.
pros: Quire is intuitive and easy to learn, its nested task feature is best for project planning. The performance is fast and have uncluttered design that helps to maintain focus.
cons: Quire's reporting and analytics capability is a bit basic compared to other tools, if you need detailed insight in your productivity trends it is not the best choice.

description: I appreciate quire is more than an app but a project breaker with good customer support
author: Princess O.
pros: No glitches no adds on quire mobile app this are the things I appreciate and also I can track my projects from end to end
cons: Sometimes I do face challenges on quire notifications aspect it doesn’t shows up in time

description: Quire has provided us value by enhancing our project clarity, and accelerating task completion. Overall, feature set of Quire matches our team needs.
author: Alex R.
pros: Task management is effortless in Quire because of its clean and minimalist interface. Team collaboration is seamless, I can see modification as it happens.
cons: No real communication feature available in Quire, only communication way is through comment on tasks. It would be great if they provides dedicated chat feature.

author: John E.
pros: When I compared quire to other project management tools, I have noticed that Quire's features are a little simplistic. It may not include all of the advanced features that I require on occasion but it makes task management easier and effortless
cons: I would love it if they can include more features to simplify and improve teamwork and clearer communication
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: loyola M.
pros: What I like the most about Quire is the ease of assigning ToDos through the tagging system when you're part of a team (and as such being able to track the projects easier).
cons: What i like the least about Quire is the initial effort that has to be put in to figure out the organisation of what is where (especially as part of a bigger team).
author_profession: Secretary of High School education team
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple Project Planning That Fits Marketing Workflows
description: Quire has made it easier to plan campaigns, organize content work, and keep deadlines clear for everyone on the team. Once I set up our projects, it became a smooth daily tool for tracking tasks and keeping campaigns moving. It’s lightweight, easy to understand, and works well for both quick tasks and larger marketing projects.
author: Mark F.
pros: I like how Quire lets me break campaigns into clear steps and switch between list, board, and calendar views. It keeps my team aligned, and the integrations with Google Calendar, Slack, and Drive make coordination much simpler.
cons: The mobile app needs an internet connection for almost everything, and I sometimes wish it had more built-in reporting for larger projects.

review_title: Easy Task Planning for Security Work
description: Quire helps me break down security tasks, audits, and incident steps into a clear checklist that’s easy to follow. It keeps my work organized without feeling heavy or complicated, which makes it useful for daily security operations.
author: Kaitlyn M.
pros: I like the simple layout, the nested tasks, and how quickly I can switch between views like list or board. It connects well with tools like Slack and Google Calendar, so updates and reminders stay in one place.
cons: The mobile app needs an internet connection for most actions, and it doesn’t offer deep reporting, so larger security teams may need extra tools.

description: Overall, Quire is a great tool for teamwork and flexibility. It helps in detailed project management without overwhelming the dashboard.
author: Shreya B.
pros: The subtasks system and the intuitive interface helps planning creative projects easily. I like the timeline view.
cons: Notification is slightly delayed sometimes, which causes minor communication gaps. Mobile app feels slower compared to web version.

description: Quire is a strong project management tool for teams and individuals who value simplicity, visual task organization,but it may not be the best fit for larger teams
author: ERIN M.
pros: I love quire because i can work offline, and their changes will sync once they reconnect to the internet, ensuring productivity even without a stable connection
cons: I personally feel that the mobile app experience is not as robust or user-friendly as the desktop version, which could be a limitation

description: I can easily track progress of my tasks with Quire. Again, I can complete my tasks on time with Quire.
author: Sadhnaa K.
pros: With Quire, I can easily prioritize important tasks. I can easily create my task list with Quire. Quire offers reccuring tasks feature. It's simple to organize, manage and execute my daily tasks with Quire.
cons: There is no aspect of Quire that fails to accomplish my task management needs.

description: Quire provides flexible task hierarchy, perfect for break down complex work. some features like automation and integration are limited.
author: Jonathan A.
pros: Nested task structure and real-time sync for collaboration features helps to reduce miscommunication across team members.
cons: Quire does not support custom workflow and automation. Analytics and reports could be more detailed.

description: We use quire to manage our marketing campaigns and collaboration. It helps us in many things from project planning to managing tasks. Overall, it is a great tool that has helped us in enhancing our productivity.
author: Emma W.
pros: I like many things in Quire- 1. I can assign a single task to multiple people. 2. Messages and chats sync real-time in my devices. 3. Mobile app works offline and sync when I back online. 4. Edit multiple tasks by selecting them.
cons: Things I did not like in Quire- 1. Require 3rd party integration for time tracking. 2. Voice/video call not available. 3. No custom automation features.

description: My overall experience is that, i am very happy with this software
author: Bakare O.
pros: project management is difficult, not so easy, no chance for errors or disappointment and so much to monitor at once, Quire software is the the best i hve ever used, this sofware contaings all the nitty gritty of any thing project managment without looking so jam packed or so choked up, My work tab with team colaboration feature, the deliverables, persnalied notifications, the feature i even love the most is the smart tracking which we can share links to client so that they can monitor the project live a each milestone is been reached, this software is a premium, the icing on the cake is that this isnt just a web app, it also has a mobile app which allows me to even follow up right from my mobile device anywhere, anytime
cons: This software is the best, no issues at all, and for the mobile apps, there as always been frequent updates which i believe solved any problems even before it becomes major

description: Quire has been a game-changer for project management. Its ease of use and emphasis on collaboration have greatly improved my team's productivity. While there are some limitations, particularly regarding integrations and mobile functionality, the benefits far outweigh the cons. I would highly recommend Quire to anyone looking to streamline their project management processes and enhance team collaboration.
author: Jenny D.
pros: The software adapts well to different project types, whether it's agile development, marketing campaigns, or event planning
cons: The mobile version, while functional, lacks some features present in the desktop version, making it less effective for managing projects on the go

description: Quire is a effective project management tool, collaboration is smooth and nested task system is a game-changer.
author: Tushar P.
pros: I've been using Quire for a few months now for task and project management. I am impressed by its clean interface.
cons: Mobile app notification can be improved a bit like the desktop version.

author: Novo A.
pros: I must say this software has really made me to be best at what i do at work which has made it easy for me to perform my job function efficiently with its great features. Its project management and planning features has been the most important one for me as i have used it to achieving and improving production rate. Not only that its time tracking, task management and online marketing features has been helpful to me. Simple to set up and use with a good interface it has. Not costly for me. Its been the ideal and perfect software for me.
cons: I like everything about it, nothing to hate using this software.

review_title: Quire helps in balancing simplicity with effective task organization and collaboration.
description: my experience with Quire has been quite positive. The software has significantly improved my project management efficiency, especially with its focus on breaking down projects into manageable tasks. The collaborative tools have enhanced communication with my team, boosting our productivity and engagement.
author: Howard H.
pros: I appreciate the multiple views available (list, board, calendar), which cater to my preferences and the specific requirements of my projects.
cons: I’ve noticed that some advanced project management features, like Gantt charts, are missing compared to other tools.

review_title: Quire as a 10/10 project management platform
author: Dami A.
pros: It has made project management a relatively easy endeavor as tasks can be managed and assigned with programs tracked and various teams also carried along simultaneously.
cons: I don’t have any issues or problems with any features on this platform at all. The mobile platform has also been very helpful.

review_title: Easy Instant chat messaging with customers using Quire.
author: Mary O.
pros: Its online instant chat feature has really been helpful to me which has allow me to easily chat with various customers at a time on various new project works and its development. It has really made my work easy to do as i can get to communicate with a lot of people as a customer care service. Easy to use and i like its interface because of its productive features it has. Its time tracking feature has also help me to stay up to date on various schedules and manage my time efficiently which has made me to be highly productive in what i do.
cons: It makes my work easy for me to do so i have no issues with using this software.

author: Garret B.
pros: Quire app interface is very clear and I like the way quire Keep all project-related files in one place for easy reference
cons: Quire is absolutely a great tool and reliable
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
